plan_md:
# FibonacciSequenceGenerator

## Description
A Python utility to generate and print the first 15 Fibonacci numbers

## Architecture
A simple script-based architecture utilizing a single Python file to execute and print the Fibonacci sequence

## Tech Stack
Python

## Files
- main.py — This file contains the code to generate and print the first 15 Fibonacci numbers

## Entry Point
main.py
